title: Hallmark Bottle Bags, Pack of 3, Silver Foil Waves Design, Birthday, Christmas, Gift Bags, White
features: GIFT BAGS: Our classic bottle bags are not only functional for a range of products but presentable for any occasion too! With a silver waves design it can turn any bottled gift into a thoughtful gesture, making it ideal for a birthday and more.

GOLD GIFT BAGS: This pack of 3 Hallmark gift bags is the perfect choice for any occasion and celebration including a birthday, anniversary and more. Each bag features 1 white design with silver metallic foil wave design and white knitted paper handles.

SILVER GIFT TAG: Each gift bag comes complete with co-ordinating rectangular plain silver foil gift tags. The tags provide enough space for your own personal message, from a birthday wish to a celebratory message. Adding that special touch to your gift.

HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This product is fully recyclable, and made of material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources. All parts of this gift bag are fully recyclable, including the knitted paper handles.

BOTTLE BAG SIZE: Each gift bag measures 32.7cm by 13.3cm by 8.2cm and is the perfect accessory to deliver a special gin, their favourite bottle of fizz, a whiskey and more. Make their celebration one to remember no matter the occasion.
